case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $10,980.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO STAY FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA KIMURA, CLIFFORD N

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $10,980.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $10,980.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
